title: JUIT B. Tech. / M.Tech. / M.Sc. Biotechnology Alumni Pursuing Higher Studies at World Class Universities
content: JUIT B. Tech. / M.Tech. / M.Sc. Biotechnology Alumni Pursuing Higher Studies at World Class Universities Ms. Drishti Awasthi 201817 B. Tech. BT 2020-2024 Ms. Drishti Awasthi has selected for MS in Chemical and Biomolecular Engineering from John Hopkins, North Charles Street, Baltimore, MD, USA. (Offer Letter Date: April 7, 2025) She also got an acceptance letter from NYU (Offer Letter Date: March 28, 2025). Ms. Ishita 191816 B. Tech. BT 2019-2023 Ms. Ishita has selected for MS in Engineering Management program from John Hopkins, Baltimore, MD, USA (Offer Letter Date: March 25, 2025) Dr. Monika Choudhary (Ph.D. Biotechnology) Roll No: 176556 Ph.D. Awarded: 13/09/2023 Dr. Monika Chaudhary has secured a postdoctoral position at the Mount Sinai Health System, USA (2024). Dr. Anil Kumar (Ph.D. Biotechnology) Roll No: 136566 Ph.D. Awarded: 9/11/2018 Dr. Anil Sharma has been selected for a postdoctoral position at the University of Nottingham, UK (2024). Ms. Sirina Kalia (M.Sc. Biotechnology) Roll No: 225111008 Batch: 2022-2024 Sirina Kalia, an M.Sc. Biotechnology student, has been selected for a fully funded Ph.D. program in Biochemistry at the University of South Carolina, USA. Her selection includes a teaching assistantship, research assistantship, full tuition fee waiver, and health insurance sponsorship Ms. Ankita Singh (M.Sc. Biotechnology) Roll No: 217804 Batch: 2021-2023 Ms. Ankita Singh (M.Sc. Biotechnology) one of our MSc alumni has joined IBRI, Noida https://www.ibri.org.in/ as a Research Associate. Mr. Divyansh Bhadiar (M.Sc. Biotechnology) Roll No: 207818 Batch: 2020-2022 Mr. Divyansh Bhadiar (M.Sc. Biotechnology) got selected at IIT Roorkee for Ph.D. program. He Cleared DBT, BET, JRF (category-1) 2023, DBT, BITP 2023, GATE 2023, TIFR 2023. Mr. Yash Sharma (M.Sc. Biotechnology) 207802 2020-2022 Mr. Yash Sharma (207802) Our M.Sc. Biotechnology student qualified CSIR NET examination with all India Rank 129. Yash Sharma is also selected in PNR Lab in the division of Biological Sciences as JRF in IISc, Bangalore. Ms. Harshita Sharma (M.Sc. Biotechnology) 207822 2020-2022 Ms. Harshita (M.Sc. Biotechnology) is one of our M.Sc. alumni got All India Rank 1 in Open category of JNU Ph.D.entrance examination of Life Sciences stream. She also ranked 46 in CSIR NET examination, 2022. Harshita was admitted in JUIT for MSc Biotechnology through GAT-B exam conducted by DBT, Government of India during the academic year 2022-23 with AIR 114. Ms. Natasha Panchal (M.Sc. Biotechnology) 197813 2019-2021 Ms. Natasha Paschal (M.Sc. Biotechnology) is one of our M.Sc. alumni is selected in Indian Army with ALL INDIA RANK 01 and will be joining Officer's Training Academy. Ms. Shivangini Singh (M.Tech. Bio­ Technology) Roll No: 1618112 Batch: 2016 -2020 Shivangini Singh, an M.Tech. Bio­ technology student, has been selected for a re­ search project under Prof. Ashwini Chauhan at Florida A&M University, USA. Sponsored by the U.S. Department of Defense, Shivangini will focus her Ph.D. research on microbial indicators of a healthy gut ecosystem using metaomics. She has also been awarded a full stipend and tuition fee waiver. Ms. Rimjhim 191804 B. Tech.
